# Upstream Ultra HDR Samples

This directory contains a copied fixture from the upstream repository:

- repository: `https://github.com/MishaalRahmanGH/Ultra_HDR_Samples`
- original file: `Originals/Ultra_HDR_Samples_Originals_05.jpg`
- upstream license: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International

The upstream license text is copied locally as
`LICENSE-CC-BY-4.0.txt`.

This fixture is used only for real-world integration coverage of Ultra HDR
container inspection and decode behavior.
